evidence.shareholders: Shareholders (GMS) Dewan Komisaris LAPORAN KEUANGAN KONSOLIDASIAN 127 CONSOLIDATED FINANCIAL STATEMENTS Board of Commissioners Laporan Keuangan Konsolidasian 183 Consolidated Financial Statements Laporan Tahunan 2024 Annual Report 5 Ikhtisar Kinerja Performance Overview 01 Menghadapi tantangan bisnis di sepajang tahun 2024, Perseroan berhasil mencapai kinerja yang positif melalui inovasi dan kolaborasi tim yang solid. Keberhasilan ini membuktikan bahwa ketangguhan dan adaptasi adalah kunci untuk meraih keberlanjutan bisnis. Despite facing business challenges throughout 2024, the Company achieved positive performance driven by innovation and solid team collaboration. This success demonstrates that resilience and adaptability are key to achieving business sustainability. evidence.free_float: Saham publik dalam menerima dividen. Shareholders to receive dividends. Jadwal, jumlah, dan jenis pembayaran dari pembagian dividen The schedule, amount, and type of dividend payments will follow akan mengikuti rekomendasi dari Direksi, akan tetapi tidak the recommendations of the Board of Directors, but there is no ada kepastian apakah Perseroan dapat membagikan dividen certainty whether the Company can distribute dividends in every dalam setiap periode akuntansi. Keputusan untuk pembayaran accounting period. The decision to pay dividends will depend on dividen akan bergantung kepada persetujuan manajemen yang management’s approval based on several factors including: mendasarkan pertimbangannya pada beberapa faktor antara lain: a. Pendapatan dan ketersediaan arus kas Perseroan; a. The income and availability of the Company’s cash flows; b. Proyeksi keuangan dan kebutuhan modal kerja Perseroan; b. Financial projections and the Company’s working capital needs; c. Prospek usaha Perseroan; c. The Company’s business prospects; d. Belanja modal dan rencana investasi lainnya; dan d. Capital expenditures and other investment plans; and e. Rencana investasi dan pendorong pertumbuhan lainnya. e. Investment plans and other growth drivers. Penentuan jumlah dan pembayaran dividen atas saham tersebut, The determination of the amount and payment of dividends for these akan bergantung pada rekomendasi Direksi Perseroan dengan shares will depend on the recommendations of the Company’s mempertimbangkan beberapa faktor yang meliputi laba ditahan, Board of Directors, considering several factors including retained kondisi keuangan, kondisi likuiditas, prospek usaha di masa earnings, financial conditions, liquidity conditions, future business depan, dan kebutuhan kas. prospects, and cash needs. Dividen akan dibayarkan dalam Rupiah. Pemegang Saham pada Dividends will be paid in Indonesian Rupiah. Shareholders on the tanggal pencatatan akan memperoleh hak atas dividen dalam recording date will be entitled to receive dividends in full and will be jumlah penuh dan dikenakan ketentuan pajak penghasilan yang subject to applicable income tax provisions in Indonesia. Dividends berlaku di Indonesia. Dividen yang diterima oleh Pemegang Saham received by Shareholders from outside Indonesia will be subject dari luar Indonesia akan dikenakan pajak penghasilan sebesar to a 20% (twenty percent) income tax (in accordance with t

evidence.AR-MutuAgung-International-2023-Submit-O: Consolidated Statements of Profit or Loss and Komprehensif Lain Konsolidasian Other Comprehensive Income Laporan Perubahan Ekuitas Konsolidasian 5-6 Consolidated Statements of Changes in Equity Laporan Arus Kas Konsolidasian 7–8 Consolidated Statements of Cash Flows Catatan atas Laporan Keuangan Konsolidasian 9 - 81 Notes to the Consolidated Financial Statements draft/March 27, 2024 paraf: No. 00548/2.1133/AU.1/05/1669-1/1/III/2024 Laporan Auditor Independen Independent Auditor’s Report Pemegang Saham, Dewan Komisaris, dan Dewan The Shareholders, Board of Commissioners, and Direksi Board of Directors PT Mutuagung Lestari Tbk PT Mutuagung Lestari Tbk Opini Opinion Kami telah mengaudit laporan keuangan We have audited the consolidated financial konsolidasian PT Mutuagung Lestari Tbk dan entitas statements of PT Mutuagung Lestari Tbk and its anaknya (“Grup”), yang terdiri dari laporan posisi subsidiary (“the Group”), which comprise the keuangan konsolidasian tanggal 31 Desember 2023, consolidated statement of financial position as at serta laporan laba rugi dan penghasilan komprehensif December 31, 2023, and the consolidated statement lain konsolidasian, laporan perubahan ekuitas of profit or loss and other comprehensive income, konsolidasian, dan laporan arus kas konsolidasian consolidated statement of changes in equity, and untuk tahun yang berakhir pada tanggal tersebut, serta consolidated statement of cash flows for the year catatan atas laporan keuangan konsolidasian, then ended, and notes to the consolidated financial termasuk informasi kebijakan akuntansi material. statements, including material accounting policies information. Menurut opini kami, laporan keuangan konsolidasian In our opinion, the accompanying consolidated terlampir menyajikan secara wajar, dalam semua hal financial statements present fairly, in all material yang material, posisi keuangan konsolidasian Grup respects, the consolidated financial position of the tanggal 31 Desember 2023, serta kinerja keuangan Group as at December 31, 2023, and its consolidated konsolidasian dan arus kas konsolidasiannya untuk financial performance and its consolidated cash tahun yang berakhir pada tanggal tersebut, sesuai flows for the year then ended, in accordance with dengan Standar Akuntansi Keuangan di Indonesia. Indonesian Financial Accounting Standards. Basis Opini Basis for Opinion Kami melaksanakan audit kami berdasarkan Standar We conducted our audit in accordance with Audit yang ditetapkan oleh Institut Akuntan Publik Standards on Auditing established by the Indonesian Indonesia. Tanggung jawab kami menurut standar Institute of Certified Public Accountants. Our tersebut diuraikan lebih lanjut dalam paragraf responsibilities under those standards are further Tanggung Jawab Auditor terhadap Audit atas Laporan described in the Auditor’s Responsibilities for the Keuangan Konsolidasian pada laporan kami. Kami Audit of the Consolidated Financial Statements independen terhadap Grup berdasarkan ketentuan paragraph of our report. We are independent of the etika yang relevan dalam audit kami atas laporan Group in accordance with the ethical requirements keuangan konsolidasian di Indonesia, dan kami telah that are relevant to our audit of the consolidated memenuhi tanggung jawab etika lainnya berdasarkan financial statements in Indonesia, and we have ketentuan tersebut. Kami yakin bahwa bukti audit fulfilled our other ethical responsibilities in yang telah kami peroleh adalah cukup dan tepat untuk accordance with these requirements. We believe that menyediakan suatu basis bagi opini audit kami. the audit evidence we have obtained is sufficient and appropriate to provide a basis for our opinion. Hal Audit Utama Key Audit Matters Hal audit utama adalah hal-hal yang, menurut Key audit matters are those matters that, in our pertimbangan profesional kami, merupakan hal yang professional judgment, were of most significance in paling signifikan dalam audit kami atas laporan our audit of the consolidated financial statements of keuangan konsolidasian periode kini. Hal-hal tersebut the current period. Cadangan kerugian penurunan nilai piutang 1. Allowance for impairment losses on trade usaha receivables Grup mengakui piutang usaha dan cadangan The Group recognizes trade receivables and its kerugian penurunan nilainya masing-masing allowances for impairment losses of sebesar Rp89.504.042.058 dan Rp19.540.785.566 Rp89,504,042,058 and Rp19,540,785,566, pada tanggal 31 Desember 2023. respectively as at December 31, 2023. Perhitungan cadangan kerugian penurunan nilai The calculation of allowance for impairment piutang usaha mengharuskan manajemen untuk losses of trade receivables requires the mengestimasi kemungkinan-tertimbang nilai kini management to estimate the probability-weighted dari perbedaan arus kas entitas berdasarkan present value of the difference between the cash kontrak dan arus kas yang diharapkan akan flows due to the entity in accordance with the diterima Grup. Perhitungan melibatkan contract and the cash flows that the Group pertimbangan manajemen dan estimasi yang expects to receive. The calculation involves signifikan seperti faktor makroekonomi, tingkat significant management judgment and estimates diskonto dan tingkat kemungkinan gagal bayar such as macroeconomic factors, discount rates, pelanggan. and customer probability of default rates. Kebijakan akuntansi cadangan kerugian penurunan The accounting policies for allowance for nilai piutang usaha dijelaskan pada Catatan 2.g dan impairment losses of trade receivables are set out detail cadangan diungkapkan pada Catatan 6 dan in Note 2.g and the detail of the allowances have 31 laporan keuangan konsolidasian. been disclosed in Notes 6 and 31 to the consolidated financial statements. Bagaimana hal ini ditangani dalam audit How the matter was addressed in the audit - Kami memeroleh pemahaman dan - We obtained an understanding and evaluated mengevaluasi pengendalian manajemen the management's control in respect of the sehubungan dengan cadangan kerugian allowance for impairment losses on trade penurunan nilai piutang usaha. receivables. - Kami memeroleh dan membandingkan - We obtained and compared the calculation perhitungan cadangan kerugian penurunan of allowance for impairment losses on trade piutang usaha dengan jumlah tercatat pada receivables to the amount recorded in the catatan keuangan. financial records. - Kami mengevaluasi model perhitungan - We evaluated the calculation model of penurunan nilai, menilai kewajaran asumsi impairment losses, assessed the yang digunakan, dan menguji data input yang reasonableness of the assumption used, and digunakan dalam perhitungan. tested the input data used in the calculation. - Kami memeriksa akurasi matematis - We checked the mathematical accuracy of perhitungan manajemen dan membandingkan management's calculation and compared to dengan saldo tercatat pada catatan keuangan. the amount recorded in the financial records. - Kami menilai kecukupan pengungkapan - We assessed the adequacy of the related terkait yang disajikan di Catatan 2.g, 6 dan 31 disclosures provided in Notes 2.g, 6 and 31 atas laporan keuangan konsolidasian. to the consolidated financial statements. 2. Akuntansi sewa 2. Accounting for lease Grup mengakui aset hak guna-neto dan liabilitas The Group recognizes right-of-use assets-net and sewa masing-masing sebesar Rp17.686.859.567 lease liabilities of Rp17,686,859,567 and dan Rp5.296.181.602 pada tanggal 31 Desember Rp5,296,181,602, respectively as at December 2023.
